name: Watering Can Set X Sand Toys 15pc - Sunsquad™
description:
Explore the joy of outdoor play with the watering can set x sand toys from Sun Squad™. This 15-piece collection is crafted from plastic, perfect for little hands to create sandy masterpieces. With a height and width of 10.35 inches and a depth of 14.3 inches, it's easy to carry to the beach or sandbox. Encourage creativity and fun in the sun with this delightful set, ideal for young adventurers.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
